name: Caramelized Onion Focaccia
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Gold Medal Better for Batter Flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure carefully, placing all ingredients except Onion Topping and cheeses in the bread machine pan in the order recommended by the manufacturer.
2. Select: Dough/Manual cycle.
3. Grease a cookie sheet. Pat dough into a 12-inch circle on the cookie sheet. Cover and let rise in a warm place about 30 minutes or until almost doubled.
4. Prepare Onion Topping.
5. Heat oven to 400°F. Make deep depressions in dough at 1-inch intervals with a finger or handle of a wooden spoon. Spread topping over dough. Sprinkle with cheeses.
6. Bake 15 to 18 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown. Remove from cookie sheet to a wire rack. Serve warm.
ONION TOPPING:
3 tbsp Margarine or butter
2 medium onions, sliced
2 cloves garlic, finely chopped
Melt margarine in a 10-inch skillet over medium-low heat. Cook onions and garlic in margarine for 15 to 20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until onions are brown and caramelized. Remove from heat.
